features.name: Project scaffold + HTTPS certs
features.nameZh: 项目脚手架 + HTTPS 证书
features.description: Initialize Node.js/TypeScript project structure, install dependencies (ws, express), generate dev SSL certs, set up tsconfig and basic dev scripts
features.descriptionZh: 初始化项目结构，安装依赖，生成自签名 HTTPS 证书，配置 TypeScript 和开发脚本
features.evidence: init.sh passes (install, typecheck, build). Server starts, generates self-signed certs, serves HTTPS on :3000. 2026-05-13

features.name: WebSocket server + phone client
features.nameZh: WebSocket 服务端 + 手机客户端
features.description: HTTPS server serving phone UI page, WebSocket server accepting connections. Phone page: getUserMedia → MediaStreamTrackProcessor → AudioEncoder (opus) → ws.send encoded chunks. Verify chunks arrive server-side.
features.descriptionZh: 手机采集麦克风 → WebCodecs AudioEncoder 编码 opus → WebSocket 发送编码块到服务端
features.evidence: E2E test: 5 binary chunks sent, server logged chunk #1-5 with byte counts, disconnect summary. Typecheck + build + server start all pass. 2026-05-13

features.name: Server audio decode → virtual mic
features.nameZh: 服务端音频解码 → 虚拟麦克风
features.description: Decode incoming opus chunks to PCM and output to VB-Cable virtual audio device. End-to-end audio flow: phone mic → PC speakers/VB-Cable.
features.descriptionZh: 服务端解码 opus 为 PCM，输出到 VB-Cable 虚拟声卡，实现手机麦克风→PC 音频端到端通路
features.evidence: Phases 1-4 complete. File mode: 100 opus frames verified. ffplay mode: 440Hz sine → speaker verified. WASAPI mode: WinMM waveOut via koffi (pure JS FFI) → VB-Cable verified (192KB PCM). E2E phone → PC audio test passed (real phone, Chrome, VB-Cable). ffplay auto-restart (max 3). State callbacks to phone UI. 2026-05-16

features.name: Connection UX + error handling
features.nameZh: 连接体验 + 错误处理
features.description: PC management page with QR code, real-time status, log panel. Phone UI: connection feedback, auto-reconnect, error handling. Auto-open browser on startup, route split: / → pc.html, /phone → client.
features.descriptionZh: PC 管理页面：二维码、实时状态、日志面板。手机 UI：连接状态、自动重连、错误处理。启动自动打开浏览器，路由拆分：/ → pc.html, /phone → 手机端
features.evidence: PC dashboard with QR code, real-time status, log panel, metrics. Phone auto-reconnect (exponential backoff, max 10). Mic permission error handling. Auto-open browser (windowsHide: true). Route split: / → pc.html, /phone → client. IP detection filters virtual adapters, prefers private LAN. WASAPI targets VB-Cable by device ID. E2E phone → PC audio verified. 2026-05-16

features.name: Latency tuning + quality controls
features.nameZh: 延迟调优 + 质量控制
features.description: Tweak AudioEncoder frame duration, bitrate, FFmpeg buffer params. Add basic quality selector (voice/music). Measure and document end-to-end latency.
features.descriptionZh: 调整 MediaRecorder 切片时间、FFmpeg 缓冲参数、Opus 比特率。添加音质选择器，测量端到端延迟

features.name: WebRTC P2P transport (optional)
features.description: Replace AudioEncoder + WS with RTCPeerConnection for lower latency. Phone sends MediaStreamTrack directly. Server uses werift (TS WebRTC) to receive. Keep WS for signaling only.
features.descriptionZh: 将 MediaRecorder + WebSocket 替换为 RTCPeerConnection 以降低延迟。手机直接发送 MediaStreamTrack，服务端通过 werift 接收，WebSocket 仅用于信令

features.name: Windows pkg packaging
features.description: Compile server into standalone .exe via @yao-pkg/pkg. Bundle ffmpeg.exe alongside. First-run generates self-signed certs. Output a single distributable folder.
features.descriptionZh: 通过 @yao-pkg/pkg 将服务端编译为独立 exe，附带 ffmpeg.exe，首次运行自动生成证书，输出可分发的文件夹

features.name: Launcher UX + installer
features.nameZh: 启动体验 + 安装程序
features.description: Add .bat launcher or NSIS/InnoSetup installer for Windows. Show console window with server status and QR code URL. Optionally add system tray icon for quick controls.
features.descriptionZh: 添加 bat 启动器或 NSIS/InnoSetup 安装程序。控制台窗口显示服务器状态和二维码 URL。可选添加系统托盘图标
